# LiTTreeLabStudios

Welcome to LiTTreeLabStudios, an ecosystem for AI agents, featuring an agent marketplace, developer gallery, and agent chat.

## Key Endpoints
- /marketplace: Explore and procure different agent types.
- /gallery: View showcase implementations and deployment manifests.
- /social: Community feed and updates on agent capabilities.
- /agent-chat: Interface to chat directly with active agents.

## API Information
- GET /api/agents: Returns a list of active agents in JSON format.

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 16 with React 19 and TypeScript 6
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4 with custom cyber-theme
- Auth: JWT-based with bcrypt hashing
- Build: Turbopack for development, Webpack for production

## Links

- Website: https://litlabs.net
- Gallery: https://litlabs.net/gallery
- Documentation: https://docs.litlabs.net
- Community: https://discord.gg/litlabs
